mapper.sql: SELECT P.PLANT_NO , M.MEMBER_NAME , P.PLANT_NAME , P.CLASSIFICATION , P.COUNT , P.CREATE_DATE , COUNT(PR.PLANT_NO) AS REVIEW_COUNT , COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(PR.RATING)), 0) AS AVG_RATING , MI.IMG_PATH || MI.SAVE_NAME AS PROFILE_IMAGE , PI.IMG_PATH || PI.SAVE_NAME AS MAIN_PLANT_IMAGE FROM PLANT P JOIN MEMBER M ON P.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO LEFT JOIN MEMBER_IMG MI ON MI.MEMBER_NO = P.MEMBER_NO AND MI.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN PLANT_IMG PI ON PI.PLANT_NO = P.PLANT_NO AND PI.IMG_ORDER = 1 AND PI.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN PLANT_REVIEW PR ON PR.PLANT_NO = P.PLANT_NO WHERE P.DEL_YN = 'N'

AND (
M.MEMBER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%'
P.PLANT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%'
P.CLASSIFICATION LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%'
P.GROWTH_INFO LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%'
P.PLANT_INFO LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%'
( M.MEMBER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%' OR P.PLANT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%' OR P.CLASSIFICATION LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%' OR P.GROWTH_INFO LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%' OR P.PLANT_INFO LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%' )
)
GROUP BY P.PLANT_NO , M.MEMBER_NAME , P.PLANT_NAME , P.CLASSIFICATION , P.COUNT , P.CREATE_DATE , MI.IMG_PATH , MI.SAVE_NAME , PI.IMG_PATH , PI.SAVE_NAME
ORDER BY P.PLANT_NO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.select: SELECT P.PLANT_NO , P.PLANT_NAME , P.CLASSIFICATION , P.COUNT , P.CARBON_CAPTURE , P.CREATE_DATE , P.PLANT_INFO , P.GROWTH_INFO , M.MEMBER_ID , P.PLANT_API FROM PLANT P Join MEMBER M USING(MEMBER_NO) WHERE P.PLANT_NO = #{plantNo} AND P.DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLANT WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLANT P JOIN MEMBER M ON P.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO WHERE P.DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE PLANT SET COUNT = COUNT + 1 WHERE PLANT_NO = #{plantNo}
